raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Gaäls Eebeda Dehls
nahze arridsan ar fatweem Brah-
feem/ un gahje us Sikeimu/ un
tee Namineeki no Sikeima pa-
fahwahs us winnu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee isgahje us Lauku/
un nolaffija tawus Wihna-Kal-
nus/ un spaidija tahs (Wihna-
Ohgas)/ un darrija teizamas
Dseefmas/ un tee gahje fawa
Deewa Nammâ/ un ehde un
dsehre/ un lahdeja Abimeleki.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Gaäls Eebeda Dehls
fazzija: Kas irr Abimeleks? un
kas irr Sikeims/ ka mums win-
nam buhs kalpoht? woj tas ne
irr Jerub-Baalâ Dehls/ un See-
buls winna Usraugs? Kalpojeet
labbaki Eemora Sikeima Tehwa
Wihreem/ jo kapelhz buhtum
mehs winnam kalpojschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ak! faut schee Laudis
mannâ Rohkâ buhtu / gann es
gribbetu Abimelekn tsdsiht. Un
us Abimeleku fazztja wiꞥsch:
Wairo tawu Karra-Spehku /
un nahz ahra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad Seebulsta Pilssah-
ta Wirfneeks/ Gaäla Eebeda
Dehla Wahrdus dsirdeja / tad
apskaitahs winsch/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fuhtija fleppeni Weh-
stus us Abimeleku / un fazzija :
Reds/ Gaäls Eebeda Dehls/ un
winna Brahti irr us Sikeimu
nahkuschi/ un redsi/ tee zelt prett
tew Dumpt Pilssfahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu zellees Nafti/ tu prett winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un tee Laudis/ kas pee tew irr/
un lai zitti fleppeni turrahe
Lauka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Rihtâ agri/ kad ta
Saule uslezz/ tad zellees/ un
nahz pahr to Pilssfahtu/un ran-
gi/ kad wiꞥsch un tee Laudis/
kas pee winnu irr/ prett tew ahra
ees/ tad darri winnam/ ka tawa
Rohka atraddihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs Abimeleks
un wiﬁﬁ Laudis/ kas pee winna
bija Nafti/ un turrejahs fleppe-
ni prett Sikeimu ar tschetr Kar-
rogeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Gaäls Eebeda Dehls
isgahje ahra/ un stahweja preeksch
Pilssfahta- Wahrtu Durwin:
Tad zehlahs Abimeleks un tee
Laudis/ kas pee winna bija/ kur
tee fleppeni turrejahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Gaäls tohs Lau-
dis eeraudsija/ tad fazztja wiꞥsch
us Seebulu: Reds/ no to Kalnu
Galleein nahk Laudis/ bet See-
buls fazztja us to : tu schkeet to
Kalnu Pawehni Zilwekins effam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad runnaja Gaäls wai-
raâ un fazzija: Rangi/ Laudis
nahk no tahs Semines Widdus/
un weens Karrohgs nahk no ta
Burschanas Ohsola Zetka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazztja Seebuls us
winnu: Kur nu irr tawa Mut-
te/ ar fo tu fazztji: Kas irr Abi-
meleks/ ka mums winnam buhs
kalpoht? Wojchee ne irr tee Lau-
dis/ ko tu effi apfmehjis? Jseij
nu/ luhdsans/ ahra/ un karro
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
